creator: adiel@nuvym.com
text:
Hello, I would like to add my enterprise to Consulting Services at freebsd.org page. It's text is here: 
NUVYM is the first and unique company that customize FreeBSD at Amazon Web Services. 
Our focus is to deliver High Secure solutions based on our hardened FreeBSD images running on top of AWS. 
Also we have 13 solutions on AWS Market Place based on FreeBSD that's served over 2000 customers arround the globe. 
Customer obsession is our focus. 
We use the best methodologies to plan, implement and manage our clients environments accordingly with their needs. 
Some of them: 
AWS Well-Architected Framework - Security Pillar 
ISO 27001 
NIST CSF
Please, follow us: 
https://www.linkedin.com/organization-guest/company/nuvym-cloud
